name: donadenna-ecommerce-monorepo
description: Orquestrador de scripts: roda backend do ERP (sistema_donadenna) + frontend do e-commerce em paralelo.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix ../sistema_donadenna/backend && npm install --prefix ./frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
